qa_pairs.question: How can users launch a pre-configured JupyterLab session on the Nibi cluster using the Open OnDemand portal?
qa_pairs.answer: To launch a pre-configured JupyterLab session on the Nibi cluster, users must first log in to the Nibi Open OnDemand portal at https://ondemand.sharcnet.ca. After logging in, they should click 'Compute Node' from the top menu and then select 'Nibi JupyterLab,' which will present a form to request a new session.

qa_pairs.question: What type of environment does Option 1 provide for running JupyterLab on the Nibi Open OnDemand portal?
qa_pairs.answer: Option 1 for running JupyterLab on the Nibi Open OnDemand portal provides a pre-configured environment, which is the same type of environment found on JupyterHub.
